milestone.

## Verification

- [ ] `npm run native:check`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] `npm run check`
- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] `npm run api:check`
- [ ] `npm run types:check`
- [ ] `npm run pack:check`
- [ ] `npm run wpt:selection:check`

State whether this changes `wpt-manifest.json`, selected WPT results, or
